name: Truth Talks with Lucy Saywood: The Podcast Where Wellness Gets Honest.

episodes.title: The Cult I Didn't Know I Was In
episodes.description: In this episode of Truth Talks, I sit down with Jess Weinstock to explore her nine-year journey inside a yoga organisation she later came to recognise as having many of the characteristics of a cult. What began as an inspiring and empowering movement offering community and transformation became increasingly uncomfortable. Jess started noticing troubling behaviours: unquestioning loyalty, manipulation, fear of speaking out, and leadership dynamics that left little room for dissent. Together, we explore how intelligent, thoughtful people can find themselves caught up in unhealthy group dynamics, why belonging is such a powerful human need, and what it takes to walk away when your identity, friendships and sense of community are wrapped up in an organisation. This conversation is not about blame or judgement. It's about curiosity, critical thinking and understanding the subtle ways influence, power and control can show up in wellness spaces. Please note: this episode contains discussion of coercive control, manipulation, emotional harm and cult dynamics, which some listeners might find triggering. Listener discretion is advised.
